content:
---
title: Rebooking Program Pipeline
description: Pipeline for managing on-site rebooking opportunities during a guest's current stay.
date: 2026-03-14
tags: hubspot, pipeline, rebooking, on-site, hosts, stage-ids, phase-2

---

# Rebooking Program Pipeline

> Covers [SS4.3 Mountain-Rebooking Program Pipeline](../hubspot-pms-sync-spec.md#43-mountain-rebooking-program-pipeline) of the HubSpot <-> PMS Integration Spec.

## Overview

Manages guests who are part of the rebooking program -- they rebook during their stay at a discounted rate. Deals are auto-created by HubSpot when a Closed Won guest checks in.

**Pipeline ID:** `873057543`
**Teams:** Hosts, Admin

## Stage Naming Discrepancy

The first stage has inconsistent names across sources:

| Source | Name Used |
|---|---|
| Live HubSpot `dealstage` enum | **Rebooking Sign Up** (canonical) |
| Cheat sheet | REBOOKING-CHECKED-IN |
| Spec section 4.3 | REBOOKING-CHECKED-IN |

This document uses the live HubSpot label **Rebooking Sign Up** as the canonical name. The cheat sheet and spec section 4.3 should be updated to match.

## Diagram

```
  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │  ENTRY: HubSpot auto-creates deal on Closed Won check-in│
  └────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────┘
                           │
                           ▼
  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │  REBOOKING SIGN UP  (contractsent)                      │
  │                                                         │
  │  Driver: HubSpot automation on check-in                 │
  │  PMS writes: dealstage, checkout_date                   │
  │  Manual: Setter (Stephanie) calls to get call booked,   │
  │          sets "Setter Assigned"                          │
  │  Lifecycle: Mountain Lead                               │
  │  Hosts sell rebooking during guest's stay               │
  └──────┬──────────────────────────┬───────────────────────┘
         │                          │
         │ Guest checks out         │ Guest rebooks
         │ without rebooking        │ during stay
         ▼                          ▼
  ┌──────────────────┐    ┌─────────────────────────────────┐
  │  EXPIRED          │    │  PENDING APPROVAL               │
  │  (1310031995)     │    │  (ID: TBD -- not in API yet)    │
  │                   │    │                                 │
  │  Driver: HubSpot  │    │  Driver: PMS (pending_approval) │
  │    auto on        │    │  PMS writes:                    │
  │    checkout       │    │    dealstage                    │
  │  Task: admin      │    │    confirmation_number          │
  │    delete deal    │    │    gross_revenue                │
  │    (Kara)         │    │    revenue_generated_less_      │
  │                   │    │      taxes__fees                │
  └──────┬───────────┘    │    cash_collected               │
         │                 │    checkin_date                  │
         ▼                 │    checkout_date                 │
  ┌──────────────────┐    │    deal_source: "On Site"        │
  │  Deal deleted     │    │  Manual:                        │
  └──────────────────┘    │    closed_won_reason (required)  │
                           │  Lifecycle: Mountain Customer    │
                           └──────────────┬─────────────────┘
                                          │
                                          │ Admin approves
                                          ▼
                           ┌─────────────────────────────────┐
                           │  REBOOKING CLOSED WON            │
                           │  (998541953)                     │
                           │                                  │
                           │  Driver: Admin manual move       │
                           │  Manual:                         │
                           │    stayntouch_reconciled         │
                           │    (legacy -- becomes PMS        │
                           │     Reconciled)                  │
                           │  PMS writes: final financials    │
                           │  Lifecycle: Mountain Customer    │
                           │                                  │
                           │  HubSpot automations:            │
                           │    - Creates Upsell deal         │
                           │    - Creates Past Guest deal     │
                           │    - Sarah sets owner to match   │
                           │      contact owner               │
                           │    - Creates new Rebooking deal  │
                           │      on next check-in            │
                           └──────────────┬─────────────────┘
                                          │
                                          │ Cancel
                                          ▼
                           ┌─────────────────────────────────┐
                           │  CANCELLED                       │
                           │  (ID: TBD -- not in API yet)     │
                           │                                  │
                           │  Driver: PMS (cancelled)         │
                           │  PMS writes:                     │
                           │    dealstage                     │
                           │    refund_amount                 │
                           │    cash_collected                │
                           │  Manual:                         │
                           │    cancel__reschedule_request    │
                           │    cancellationreschedule_reason │
                           │    refund_noted                  │
                           │  Lifecycle: Mountain Customer /  │
                           │    Evangelist                    │
                           │                                  │
                           │  --> Moves to Recover Pipeline   │
                           └─────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │  REBOOKING CLOSED LOST  (998541954)                     │
  │  Driver: Admin manual                                   │
  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Native HubSpot Stages

The pipeline has **at least 4 native stages** confirmed in HubSpot. Live data shows a deal in stage `1310031995` which, based on timing (entered the day after checkout), is almost certainly "Expired". Pending Approval and Cancelled may also have dedicated stage IDs in this pipeline that have not yet been confirmed via API.

| Stage ID | Label | Confirmed |
|---|---|---|
| `contractsent` | Rebooking Sign Up | Yes -- live HubSpot enum |
| `1310031995` | Expired (likely) | Yes -- live deal data |
| TBD | Pending Approval | No -- needs API query |
| `998541953` | Rebooking Closed Won | Yes -- live HubSpot enum |
| `998541954` | Rebooking Closed Lost | Yes -- live HubSpot enum |
| TBD | Cancelled | No -- needs API query |

> **Action required:** Query HubSpot pipeline stages API for pipeline `873057543` to get the complete stage list and fill in missing IDs for Expired, Pending Approval, and Cancelled.

## Stage Detail

### Rebooking Sign Up (`contractsent`)

**Driver:** HubSpot automation on check-in of a Closed Won deal.
**Lifecycle stage:** Mountain Lead

```
PMS writes (on rebooking_hold):
  dealstage          = "contractsent"
  checkout_date      = booking.checkOut

Manual actions:
  setter_assigned    = Stephanie (setter calls to get call booked)

HubSpot deal name:
  "New Rebooking Opp | " (HubSpot automation template -- not PMS-generated)
```

### Expired (`1310031995`)

**Driver:** HubSpot automation on guest checkout (no rebooking sold).
**Lifecycle stage:** (not set)

```
PMS writes:          (none)

HubSpot automation:
  Task: admin delete deal (currently Kara)
```

### Pending Approval (ID: TBD)

**Driver:** PMS (`pending_approval` status).
**Lifecycle stage:** Mountain Customer

```
PMS writes:
  dealstage                           = (stage ID -- TBD)
  confirmation_number                 = booking.confirmationNumber
  gross_revenue                       = booking.totalAmount
  revenue_generated_less_taxes__fees  = booking.totalAmount - sum(addons.taxAmount)
  cash_collected                      = sum(payments where status=succeeded, type!=refund)
  checkin_date                        = booking.checkIn
  checkout_date                       = booking.checkOut
  deal_source                         = "On Site"
  rebooking_deposit_amount            = (if applicable)

Manual actions (required before Closed Won):
  closed_won_reason                   = (string -- staff fills)

HubSpot automation:
  Task: admin reconcile with PMS (legacy: "Reconcile with SNT")
```

### Rebooking Closed Won (`998541953`)

**Driver:** Admin manual move after reconciliation.
**Lifecycle stage:** Mountain Customer

```
PMS writes:
  dealstage                           = "998541953"
  (all financial fields recomputed -- final amounts)

Manual actions:
  stayntouch_reconciled               = true (legacy -- becomes pms_reconciled)

HubSpot automations:
  - Creates deal in Upsell Pipeline
  - Creates deal in Past Guest Pipeline
  - Sarah sets owner to match contact owner
  - Creates new Rebooking deal on next check-in
  - Recorded in Reports & Dashboards
```

### Cancelled (ID: TBD)

**Driver:** PMS (`cancelled` status).
**Lifecycle stage:** Mountain Customer / Evangelist

```
PMS writes:
  dealstage                           = (stage ID -- TBD)
  refund_amount                       = sum(payments where type=refund, status=succeeded)
  cash_collected                      = recomputed after refund

Manual actions:
  cancel__reschedule_request          = (string -- free text, include refund details)
  cancellationreschedule_reason       = (enum: "48 Hour Cancellation", "Needs to Move Dates")
  refund_noted                        = true/false (bool -- NOT "refunded")

HubSpot automation:
  Moves deal to Recover Pipeline
```

### Rebooking Closed Lost (`998541954`)

**Driver:** Admin manual.
**Lifecycle stage:** (not documented)

```
PMS writes:          (none)
Manual actions:      (none documented)
```

## PMS Status Mapping

| PMS Status | HubSpot Stage | Stage ID | Pipeline |
|---|---|---|---|
| `rebooking_hold` | Rebooking Sign Up | `contractsent` | `873057543` |
| `pending_approval` | Pending Approval | TBD | `873057543` |
| `confirmed` | Rebooking Closed Won | `998541953` | `873057543` |
| `cancelled` | Cancelled | TBD | `873057543` |

> **Critical:** The PMS `HUBSPOT_STAGE_MAP` maps `confirmed` -> `1308814489` (Reservation Closed Won) globally. For rebooking deals, the correct target is `998541953` (Rebooking Closed Won). **The PMS must know which pipeline context the booking is in** -- a Phase 2 consideration requiring the `booking_deals` join table.

## Lifecycle Stage Transitions

| Rebooking Stage | Contact Lifecycle Stage | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Rebooking Sign Up | Mountain Lead | Cheat sheet |
| Pending Approval | Mountain Customer | Cheat sheet |
| Closed Won | Mountain Customer | Cheat sheet |
| Cancelled | Mountain Customer / Evangelist | Cheat sheet |

> **Open question:** Mountain Lead at Rebooking Sign Up seems odd -- a rebooking guest has already stayed (they are at minimum Mountain Customer). This may be a cheat sheet error, or HubSpot may intentionally reset lifecycle stage for the rebooking deal context. Needs clarification.

## Complete Property Schema Per Stage

### Properties written by PMS

| HubSpot Property | Type | Rebooking Sign Up | Pending Approval | Closed Won | Cancelled |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `dealstage` | enumeration | `contractsent` | TBD | `998541953` | TBD |
| `checkout_date` | date | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| `checkin_date` | date | -- | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| `confirmation_number` | string | -- | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| `gross_revenue` | number | -- | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| `revenue_generated_less_taxes__fees` | number | -- | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| `cash_collected` | number | -- | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| `amount` | number | -- | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| `room_revenue` | number | -- | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| `total_add_on_revenue` | number | -- | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| `refund_amount` | number | -- | -- | -- | Yes |
| `deal_source` | enumeration | -- | "On Site" | -- | -- |
| `rebooking_deposit_amount` | number | -- | (if applicable) | -- | -- |

### Properties filled manually by staff

| HubSpot Property | Label | Type | When Required |
|---|---|---|---|
| `setter_assigned` | Setter Assigned | enumeration | Rebooking Sign Up (Stephanie) |
| `closed_won_reason` | Closed Won Reason | string | Pending Approval (before Closed Won) |
| `stayntouch_reconciled` | SNT Reconciled | bool | Closed Won (legacy -- becomes PMS Reconciled) |
| `cancel__reschedule_request` | Cancel / Reschedule Request | string | Cancelled |
| `cancellationreschedule_reason` | Cancellation/Reschedule Reason | enumeration | Cancelled |
| `refund_noted` | Refund Noted | bool | Cancelled (NOT `refunded`) |
| `rebooking_deposit_amount` | Rebooking Deposit Amount | number | (staff or PMS -- when applicable) |

## HubSpot Automations on Closed Won

1. Creates Upsell deal (for add-on sales during future stay)
2. Creates Past Guest deal (post-checkout tracking)
3. Sarah sets owner to match contact owner
4. Creates new Rebooking deal on next check-in (cycle repeats)
5. Recorded in Reports and Dashboards

## Key Characteristics

**On-site sales.** Hosts sell rebookings during the guest's stay. The `deal_source` is always "On Site" for rebooking deals.

**Short lifecycle.** The deal either converts during the stay or expires at checkout.

**HubSpot-generated deal names.** Live data shows deals named "New Rebooking Opp | " (HubSpot automation template). The PMS may overwrite this with `"{guestName} -- {confirmationNumber}"` when it manages rebooking deals in Phase 2.

**Phase 2 dependency.** Full PMS management of rebooking deals requires the `booking_deals` join table to track multiple deals per reservation. Until then, the PMS only writes to the initial rebooking hold stage.

## Note on Stage IDs

The current `HUBSPOT_STAGE_MAP` maps `rebooking_hold` -> `contractsent`. For `confirmed` in the rebooking context, the stage should be `998541953` (Rebooking Closed Won), not `1308814489` (Reservation Closed Won). This requires the PMS to know which pipeline context the booking is in -- a consideration for the multi-deal Phase 2 implementation.
